medical.desc: Joint statement from Nordic Ombudsmen for Children and pediatric experts arguing for the right of boys to decide for themselves.

medical.name: Belgian Medical Academies' View
medical.desc: The Royal Belgian Medical Academies advise against non-therapeutic circumcision, citing a lack of medical benefits and potential for complications.

medical.name: CPS of British Columbia Standard
medical.desc: The College of Physicians and Surgeons of British Columbia does not support the routine circumcision of newborn male infants.

medical.name: Swedish Medical Association on Circumcision
medical.desc: The Swedish Medical Association strongly advises against non-therapeutic circumcision of boys.

medical.name: Finnish Medical Association (FMA) Stance
medical.desc: The FMA demands an end to non-medical circumcision of boys, aligning with Nordic consensus.

medical.name: Norwegian Medical Association
medical.desc: Norway's doctors' union formally opposes routine circumcision of boys, advocating age limits.

medical.name: RACP 2010 Policy Statement
medical.desc: The Royal Australasian College of Physicians statement concluding there is no medical justification for routine infant circumcision.

politics pressure.name: DR: International pressure on Denmark
politics pressure.desc: Coverage of foreign pressure regarding circumcision policy

politics pressure.name: DR: Parties condemn US and Israel pressure
US Lawmakers pressure Iceland
politics pressure.desc: Bipartisan letter from US congress warning Iceland over a proposed 2018 ban on non-medical circumcision.

politics pressure.name: Iceland ban unites Jewish and Muslim groups
politics pressure.desc: Intense international religious backlash forced Iceland's parliament to eventually drop the popular bill.

politics pressure.name: ADL condemns Norway Progress Party
politics pressure.desc: The Anti-Defamation League pressured Norway when a ruling party voted to pursue a ban on circumcision in 2017.

politics pressure.name: Germany Legalizes Circumcision After Outcry
politics pressure.desc: After a Cologne court ruled circumcision as bodily harm in 2012, international pressure forced the rapid passage of secular protections.

politics pressure.name: Council of Europe 2013 Resolution Backlash
politics pressure.desc: PACE resolution calling circumcision a violation of physical integrity met immediate denunciation by religious leaders worldwide.

politics pressure.name: WJC pressures Finland over child rights
politics pressure.desc: European and World Jewish Congress sent strong warnings to Finland's government amid proposals for stricter regulations.

additional research and meta.name: German Circumcision Law

intactivist groups.name: Intact America
intactivist groups.desc: The largest national advocacy group working to end involuntary child genital cutting in the United States.

intactivist groups.name: Doctors Opposing Circumcision
intactivist groups.desc: An international group of physicians who oppose non-therapeutic circumcision of infants and children.

intactivist groups.name: Intact Denmark
intactivist groups.desc: Danish organization working for the right of children to keep their genitals intact.

intactivist groups.name: Intact Australia
intactivist groups.desc: Australian non-profit community organisation for the protection of children from genital cutting.

intactivist groups.name: Intaction
intactivist groups.desc: An educational and activist group dedicated to protecting boys and men from circumcision.

intactivist groups.name: NOHARMM
intactivist groups.desc: National Organization to Halt the Abuse and Routine Mutilation of Males.

intactivist groups.name: Attorneys for the Rights of the Child
intactivist groups.desc: A legal advocacy organization dedicated to securing the legal rights of children, including the right to bodily integrity.

intactivist groups.name: Bloodstained Men & Their Friends
intactivist groups.desc: A protest group that demonstrates against non-consensual infant circumcision.

intactivist groups.name: Your Whole Baby
intactivist groups.desc: A non-profit organization providing comprehensive information on the foreskin and circumcision to parents.

intactivist groups.name: GALDEF
intactivist groups.desc: Genital Autonomy Legal Defense and Education Fund, pursuing litigation to protect children's bodily integrity.

intactivist groups.name: intaktiv e.V.
intactivist groups.desc: A German voice for genital self-determination, advocating against non-therapeutic circumcision of children.

intactivist groups.name: Jews Against Circumcision
intactivist groups.desc: Provides a space for Jewish people who question or oppose the practice of ritual circumcision.

intactivist groups.name: Men Do Complain
intactivist groups.desc: A UK-based platform for men to share their negative experiences with circumcision.

intactivist groups.name: 15Square (NORM-UK)
intactivist groups.desc: A UK charity supporting men with foreskin issues and promoting non-surgical solutions.

intactivist groups.name: IntactiWiki
intactivist groups.desc: A wiki-based information resource covering all aspects of genital integrity and circumcision.

intactivist groups.name: Intact Global
intactivist groups.desc: International framework to unite and assist protective organizations worldwide.

intactivist groups.name: Genital Autonomy America
intactivist groups.desc: Advocacy group working to end non-therapeutic infant circumcision in America.

intactivist groups.name: National Organization of Restoring Men
intactivist groups.desc: A nonprofit support network for men undergoing foreskin restoration.

intactivist groups.name: Canadian Foreskin Awareness Project
intactivist groups.desc: Street activism and awareness project advocating for genital autonomy in Canada.

intactivist groups.name: The Darbon Institute
intactivist groups.desc: Educational think tank promoting human rights and genital autonomy.

intactivist groups.name: VMMC Experience Project
intactivist groups.desc: Documenting the negative outcomes of Voluntary Medical Male Circumcision in Africa.

intactivist groups.name: Bay Area Intactivists
intactivist groups.desc: Regional group hosting protests and raising awareness in the San Francisco Bay Area.

intactivist groups.name: Foreskin Pride
intactivist groups.desc: Advocacy focusing on body positivity and normalising intact bodies.

intactivist groups.name: Foregen
intactivist groups.desc: Medical research organization dedicated to regenerating the human foreskin.

intactivist groups.name: Circumstitions
intactivist groups.desc: Extensive online archive of arguments, research, and history opposing circumcision.

intactivist groups.name: NOCIRC
intactivist groups.desc: The National Organization of Circumcision Information Resource Centers, one of the oldest anti-circumcision groups.

intactivist groups.name: Saving Sons
intactivist groups.desc: Resources to educate parents about the risks of circumcision and how to properly care for an intact son.

intactivist groups.name: The Whole Network
intactivist groups.desc: Parenting network promoting intact care, natural birth, and children's bodily boundaries.

intactivist groups.name: Dr. Momma
intactivist groups.desc: Research and evidence-based articles regarding intact bodies, breastfeeding, and gentle parenting.
